data.body:
🔋Grid-scale batteries are replacing gas plants in CA’s evening energy peak!

On 3/29, CAISO batteries delivered 12.3 GW (43% of demand) during peak hours, sustaining over 20% of the grid for hours during the evening ramp

CA’s battery capacity has surged from 1.3 GW in 2020 to ~17 GW todsy
